meta.title: Pick Me Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: How much pick-me energy do you have? React to SNS posts and find out your pick-me level!

app.title: Pick Me Test
app.subtitle: SNS Comment Simulator
app.description: 10 SNS posts will appear in your feed. Comment, like, or scroll past. Your reactions reveal your pick-me level!

p1.image: 💻 First day at the new office! Got into a top company!
p1.caption: Getting ready for my first hello at the cafe ☕ Dreams really do come true! #NewBeginnings #Blessed
p1.c1: Congrats! That's amazing 👏 You deserve it!
p1.c2: Oh nice~ I actually got offers from a few places too but congrats to you!
p1.c3: I'll never understand people who flex their jobs but... congrats I guess!!

p2.image: 💕 6 month anniversary! This person is the best
p2.caption: The most precious person in the world ❤️ Every day feels like an anniversary #CoupleGoals
p2.c2: So jealous... I might be single forever (but I'm so nice someone should like me...)
p2.c3: I don't have anyone to post this with but must be nice (tears) I just want to love someone this much too

p3.image: 🎉 Weekend friend group hangout! Best crew ever
p3.caption: Finally got everyone together! Our friendship is the best 😂 #BestFriends #Squad
p3.c1: Looks so fun! Invite me next time~ 😆
p3.c2: Ah... I don't have gatherings like this... so jealous... (I prefer being alone quietly though...)
p3.c3: Wow... I barely have friends so seeing photos like this makes me want to cry, looks fun though

p4.caption: First marathon finished after 1 year of training! Never give up 💪 #Running #Marathon
p4.c1: Amazing! Must have been so tough, great job 👏👏
p4.c2: I work out too actually, 10km is easy for me haha~ But marathon is impressive!
p4.c3: I have achievements like this too but nobody ever notices... anyway congrats

p5.caption: Spent 1 hour getting ready this morning, worth it 💃 #OOTD #Fashion
p5.c1: So pretty! The color combo is amazing 🔥
p5.c2: Wow pretty! I actually look good even without trying so I don't bother hehe
p5.c3: I don't get people who care so much about looks... there's more important things in life

p6.image: 🍔 Found a hidden gem restaurant today! So happy
p6.caption: This burger is insane... Could eat here every day #Foodie #Burger
p6.c1: Oh where is this? I wanna try too!
p6.c2: I actually cook everything myself so I rarely eat out... being a good cook I naturally evaluate food though
p6.c3: I always eat alone so seeing this makes me sad... no one to eat with

p7.image: 🎓 Got accepted! I'm going to the Ivy League!
p7.caption: Still can't believe it... Got into my dream school! #StudyAbroad #IvyLeague
p7.c1: Wow that's incredible! Hard work pays off 🎉
p7.c2: I actually got love calls from several unis but decided to stay local. Anyway congrats!
p7.c3: Ah... no one appreciates my efforts... must be nice for you...

p8.caption: 2 months ago vs now. Dreams come true 🙌 #FitnessJourney #Transformation
p8.c1: Wow... amazing! That's serious dedication for 2 months 👏
p8.c2: Oh I work out too, but I naturally have a slim body type so I'm lucky haha
p8.c3: I work so hard but nothing changes for me... how do you do it?

p9.image: ✈️ Sunset in Bali! Living my best life
p9.caption: The most beautiful moment of my life 🌅 #Bali #TravelGram
p9.c1: So beautiful! I definitely want to visit someday 😍
p9.c2: I travel a lot too actually, but I'm more of a local travel expert so I don't do tourist spots hehe
p9.c3: I don't even have anyone to travel with... so jealous... everyone has it good...

p10.image: 🎵 First original song released! Please listen!
p10.caption: My first self-composed song! Please give it a listen 🎶 #Music #Original
p10.c1: So talented! You should put it on streaming platforms! 👏
p10.c2: I make music too actually, wanna hear mine? Maybe we should collab?
p10.c3: I'm also an artistic soul but no one appreciates me... must be nice for you

secure.name: Main Character Energy
secure.desc: Zero pick-me energy! You don't get swayed by others' SNS posts. You react sincerely or just scroll past like a boss!

chill.name: Chill Vibes
chill.desc: Mostly stable but occasionally your subtle self-promotion sneaks out. Overall, you keep it real!

mild.name: Subtle Pick-Me
mild.desc: Pick-me tendencies are showing! Your comments subtly steer toward self-promotion or comparison.

certified.name: Certified Pick-Me
certified.desc: Definite pick-me energy! You tend to make others' posts about yourself, seeking validation through SNS.

ultimate.name: Ultimate Pick-Me
ultimate.desc: Maximum pick-me energy! Every post becomes an opportunity to redirect attention to yourself!

share.title: Share Your Result
share.text: My Pick Me level is {score}%! I'm "{tier}" 🙋 Find out yours:
